title_cn: 商业伦理中的病原体压力理论：生物生态因素对企业环境可持续实践的影响
abstract_cn: 摘要 尽管生物生态决定因素在伦理和可持续商业行为中的潜在重要性，但在商业伦理研究中仍未得到充分探索。本研究考察病原体压力——一种对人类态度、意图和行为至关重要的生物生态因素——对企业环境可持续实践的影响。病原体压力指的是威胁人类健康和生存的广泛感染因子的流行，包括病毒、细菌、原生动物和蠕虫。我们推测病原体压力的高水平会对企业采取环境可持续实践产生负面影响。通过分析来自37个国家近20,000家企业的世界银行企业调查数据及国家级病原体压力指数，我们观察到在病原体流行程度较高的环境中，企业采用环境可持续实践的可能性较低。为了阐明基础因果关系，我们采用实验情境设计，识别出两个心理中介机制：一种是时间机制（趋向于短期导向增加），另一种是关系机制（内群体信任偏见增强）。我们讨论了研究结果对商业伦理研究的影响，并建议了几条未来研究方向，以深化对伦理和可持续企业决策、战略和行为的生物生态因素的理解。

title: Scaling high and wide: How firms leverage AI and organizational design to overcome the scale‐scope trade‐off
abstract: Abstract Research Summary The trade‐off between scale and scope has long posed a strategic dilemma, especially in digital settings, where specialization enables hyperscaling. Drawing on a longitudinal case study of ByteDance, we theorize how digital firms can overcome this constraint through the use of artificial intelligence (AI) combined with an adaptive organizational design. AI evolves and improves through self‐learning and cross‐fertilization across domains, becoming increasingly valuable as learning accumulates. This, however, is contingent on access to structurally related data that allow learning to transfer across domains. We show how AI reverses the conventional logic of the resource‐based view: rather than valuable resources enabling diversification, diversification amplifies the value of resources. AI thus transforms the scale‐scope nexus from being a trade‐off into a source of strategic advantage. Managerial Summary The growing centrality of AI and digital platforms is reshaping how firms pursue and sustain growth. This study examines how ByteDance leveraged AI and adaptive organizational design not only to scale rapidly but also to diversify across industries and markets. Rather than incurring rising costs or coordination complexity, the firm's AI capabilities improved with each deployment through cross‐fertilization across domains, enabling more efficient growth across multiple domains. For managers, the findings highlight how dynamic combinations of AI and organizational structure can help overcome traditional trade‐offs between scale and scope, opening new pathways for scalable, cross‐market expansion in increasingly competitive environments.
title_cn: 高效扩展：企业如何利用人工智能和组织设计克服规模-范围权衡
abstract_cn: 摘要 研究总结 规模与范围之间的权衡长期以来一直是一个战略困境，尤其是在数字环境中，专业化使得超大规模成为可能。通过对字节跳动的长期案例研究，我们理论化了数字企业如何利用人工智能（AI）结合适应性组织设计来克服这一限制。人工智能通过自我学习和跨领域的相互交融不断进化和改善，随着学习的积累，其价值也逐渐增加。然而，这依赖于对结构相关数据的获取，以便允许知识在不同领域之间转移。我们展示了人工智能如何逆转基于资源视角的传统逻辑：并非有价值的资源促进多元化，而是多元化放大了资源的价值。因此，人工智能将规模-范围关系从一种权衡转变为战略优势的来源。 管理总结 人工智能和数字平台的日益中心化正在重塑企业追求和维持增长的方式。本研究考察了字节跳动如何利用人工智能和适应性组织设计，不仅迅速扩展规模，还在各个行业和市场中进行多元化。公司的人工智能能力通过跨领域的相互交融在每次部署中不断改善，从而在多个领域实现了更高效的增长，而非承担上升的成本或协调复杂性。对于管理者而言，研究结果突显了人工智能与组织结构的动态组合如何帮助克服传统的规模与范围之间的权衡，为在日益竞争激烈的环境中开辟可扩展的跨市场扩张的新路径。

title: Responsibilising Conservation: Accountability and Ethics of Community Engagement in Biodiversity Initiatives
abstract: Abstract This paper examines how environmental non-governmental organisations (ENGOs) construct, justify and enact community engagement in biodiversity conservation, and the ethical tensions that arise as accountability responsibilities are increasingly shifted towards local communities. Drawing on the concept of responsibilisation (Rose, 1999) and using Habermasian (1984) validity claims as an analytical framework, the study analyses qualitative data from NGO-led conservation initiatives to interrogate the normative foundations and practical effects of participatory governance arrangements. The findings show that GreenAction uses a progressive engagement process, blending communication, moral framing, economic incentives, and delegated accountability rather than one participatory model. This approach justifies community involvement as both legitimate and effective, whilst at the same time embedding conservation within wider neoliberal accountability frameworks. These practices expose significant ethical challenges in managing community-based conservation. Although involving communities is ethically sound at first, it becomes more problematic as they take on greater roles in conservation work and accountability. As a result, communities are held accountable not only for protecting species but also for providing the necessary accounting evidence to demonstrate conservation outcomes. This conflation of biodiversity responsibilisation with ‘accounting responsibilisation’ marks a critical finding of the study.
title_cn: 赋予保护责任：生物多样性倡议中的社区参与责任和伦理
abstract_cn: 摘要 本文探讨了环境非政府组织（ENGOs）如何构建、辩解和实施在生物多样性保护中的社区参与，以及随着问责责任越来越多地转向地方社区而产生的伦理紧张关系。基于责任化（responsibilisation）概念（Rose，1999），并采用哈贝马斯（Habermas，1984）的有效性主张作为分析框架，本研究分析了来自非政府组织主导的保护倡议的定性数据，以审视参与式治理安排的规范基础和实际影响。研究结果表明，GreenAction采用了一种渐进的参与过程，融合了沟通、道德框架、经济激励和委托问责，而不是单一的参与模型。这种方法不仅将社区参与合理化为合法且有效，同时也将保护工作嵌入更广泛的新自由主义问责框架中。这些做法暴露出在管理基于社区的保护方面的重要伦理挑战。尽管最初让社区参与在伦理上是合理的，但随着社区在保护工作及问责中的角色日益加重，这种参与变得更为复杂。因此，社区不仅要对保护物种负责，还要提供必要的账目证据以证明保护成果。这种生物多样性责任化与“会计责任化”的混淆是本研究的一个重要发现。

title: Investment Performance of Private Pension Plans: Defined Benefit vs. Defined Contribution
abstract: Using data on over 160,000 U.S. private pension plans, we analyze the investment performance of defined benefit (DB) and defined contribution (DC) plans. We find a positive asset size effect in performance, stronger in DB plans partly because of greater economies of scale in administrative expenses. Small DB plans underperform small DC plans on various performance metrics and face the highest termination risk. After adjusting for investable passive benchmarks, DC plans outperform DB plans in all but the largest size decile. Our findings suggest that plan consolidation and converting small DB plans to the DC structure are likely to improve the efficiency of pension financing. This paper was accepted by Camelia Kuhnen, finance. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.05241 .
title_cn: 私营养老金计划的投资绩效：确定收益计划与确定供款计划的比较
abstract_cn: 利用超过160,000个美国私人养老金计划的数据，我们分析了定义福利（DB）计划和定义贡献（DC）计划的投资表现。我们发现资产规模对表现存在正面影响，在DB计划中表现更为明显，这部分是由于管理费用的规模经济效应。小型DB计划在各种表现指标上均表现不及小型DC计划，并面临最高的终止风险。在对可投资的被动基准进行调整后，DC计划在除最大规模十分位之外的所有规模段中均优于DB计划。我们的研究结果表明，计划整合和将小型DB计划转换为DC结构可能会提高养老金融资的效率。本文已被Camelia Kuhnen接受，专业为金融。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.05241获取。

title: Analyzing Network Formation Using Big Data Analytics: A Study of Degree Distribution, Clustering Coefficient, Diameter, and Assortativity
abstract: This research presents an innovative approach to network development which goes beyond conventional models that use connection rules for individual agents. We show that agents can produce diverse network structures through uniform edge searches which involve random connection attempts without preference. This model offers a new viewpoint on network formation by emphasizing edges in contrast to nodes. Within this framework, edges are considerably more crucial than those in other network formation models as they represent tangible interactions such as question-and-answer exchanges, commercial transactions, and coauthorships, rather than abstract relationships. We prove that the model converges to a stationary equilibrium degree distribution, implying that in the long term, the probability of observing certain network characteristics stabilizes and becomes time-invariant. Furthermore, we derive closed‐form asymptotic expressions for key network statistics and validate them through both simulations and real‐world data sets. Our research shows that three core dimensions are inherently in competition with one another: (1) quantity (mean degree), reflecting agents’ overall connectivity; (2) quality (clustering coefficient), capturing local cohesion; and (3) equity (skewness of the in-degree distribution), indicating how strongly connections concentrate on a few nodes. Our results show that raising the search times boosts quantity but lowers quality by diluting clustering, whereas raising the secondary connection probability enhances clustering yet decreases equity by concentrating in-degree and intensifying the Matthew effect. These trade-offs reveal essential limits of network formation while providing a flexible framework which connects theoretical insight to practical decisions in network design and management. This paper was accepted by J. George Shanthikumar, data science. Funding: The research of J. title_cn: 利用大数据分析进行网络形成分析：对度分布、聚类系数、直径和同配性的研究
abstract_cn: 本研究提出了一种创新的网络发展方法，这种方法超越了传统模型中使用个体代理的连接规则。我们表明，代理可以通过均匀的边搜索生成多样的网络结构，这种搜索涉及随机连接尝试而不设偏好。该模型通过强调边而非节点，为网络形成提供了一种新的视角。在这个框架内，边的作用远比其他网络形成模型中的边重要，因为它们代表着具体的互动形式，如问答交流、商业交易和共同署名，而不是抽象的关系。我们证明了该模型会收敛到一个稳态的平衡度分布，意味着从长远来看，某些网络特征的观察概率会稳定并变为时间不变。此外，我们推导出关键网络统计的闭合形式渐近表达式，并通过模拟和真实数据集对其进行了验证。我们的研究显示，有三个核心维度本质上彼此竞争：（1）数量（平均度），反映代理的整体连接性；（2）质量（聚类系数），捕捉局部凝聚性；（3）公平性（入度分布的偏斜度），表明连接在少数节点上的集中程度。我们的结果显示，增加搜索次数虽然可以提升数量，但却通过稀释聚类而降低了质量，而提高次级连接概率则可以增强聚类，但通过集中入度并强化马太效应而减少公平性。这些权衡揭示了网络形成的基本限制，同时提供了一个灵活的框架，将理论见解与网络设计和管理中的实际决策相连接。本文由J. George Shanthikumar接受，数据科学领域。 funding: J. Qi的研究受到中国国家自然科学基金[资助编号72422005]和香港研究资助局[资助编号GRF 16209923, 16213424及TRS T32-615/24-R]的资助。Y.-J. Chen感谢香港研究资助局的财务支持[资助编号C6020-21GF, 16212821及16204521]。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.00475访问。

title: EXPRESS: Assortment Optimization for Online Video Games
abstract: We consider an assortment optimization problem for a class of online video games where the in-game virtual store has a unique structure with two sections: Featured and Just For You (JFY). All customers (players) are offered the same Featured section assortment, whereas the JFY section is used for personalized recommendations. We model customer choice under a constrained mixture-of-nested-logit model and propose different solution methods for the resulting assortment optimization problems. First, we introduce a novel mixed-integer nonlinear programming (MINLP) formulation. Numerical experiments show that the MINLP formulation generally obtains optimal solutions efficiently, using a variety of instances derived from conversations with our industry partner to mimic the environment found in their video game stores. In addition, we propose three approximate solution methods with theoretical performance guarantees: a fully polynomial time approximation scheme (FPTAS), a mixed-integer linear programming (MILP) formulation, and a heuristic algorithm. To understand the impact of a shared Featured section, we analyze the distribution of display capacity between the Featured and JFY sections. Our numerical experiments highlight that the Featured section plays a critical role in balancing revenue and customer utility. To validate our use of a mixture-of-nested-logit model, we further conduct a simulation study based on ground-truth instances that are independent of the underlying structure of the consumer choice models we consider. The results indicate that our nested structure yields superior performance in terms of both capturing customer behavior and simulation revenue, compared with the mixture-of-MNL model and the current practice of our industry partner. Overall, our paper is the first to study assortment optimization for the gaming industry under discrete choice models; it is also the first to devise both exact and approximate solution approaches for the constrained mixture-of-nested-logit model. Our results provide guidance for effective management of assortments in online video game stores and offer an “assortment” of solution approaches, allowing practitioners to choose one that best suits their environment.
title_cn: EXPRESS：在线视频游戏的商品组合优化
abstract_cn: 我们考虑一个在线视频游戏中商品组合优化问题，在该游戏中，游戏内虚拟商店具有独特的结构，包括两个部分：推荐商品（Featured）和个性化推荐（Just For You，JFY）。所有顾客（玩家）提供相同的推荐商品组合，而JFY部分则用于个性化推荐。我们在约束混合嵌套逻辑模型下对顾客选择进行建模，并提出不同的解决方案方法来应对由此产生的商品组合优化问题。首先，我们引入了一种新颖的混合整数非线性规划（MINLP）表示。数值实验表明，MINLP表示通常能有效地获得最优解，实验使用了从我们行业合作伙伴的对话中得出的多种实例，以模仿他们视频游戏商店中的环境。此外，我们还提出了三种具有理论性能保证的近似解法：完全多项式时间近似方案（FPTAS）、混合整数线性规划（MILP）表示和启发式算法。为了理解共享推荐商品部分的影响，我们分析了推荐商品与JFY部分之间的展示容量分配。我们的数值实验凸显了推荐商品部分在平衡收入和顾客效用方面的关键作用。为了验证我们对混合嵌套逻辑模型的使用，我们进一步进行了基于与所考虑的消费者选择模型的基本结构无关的真实实例的仿真研究。结果表明，与混合多项式逻辑模型及我们行业合作伙伴当前的做法相比，我们的嵌套结构在捕捉顾客行为和仿真收入方面表现出更优的效果。总体而言，我们的论文首次在离散选择模型下研究了游戏行业的商品组合优化问题；同时也首次为约束混合嵌套逻辑模型设计了精确和近似的解决方法。我们的研究结果为在线视频游戏商店的商品组合有效管理提供了指导，并提供了一系列解决方法，让从业者可以选择最适合其环境的方案。

title: Two Sides of the Same Coin: Sustaining Loan‐Use Ambiguity in Microfinance through Harmonizing Practices
abstract: Abstract Despite its promise to alleviate poverty through entrepreneurship, microfinance is widely used for household purposes, challenging Western assumptions of microfinance as entrepreneurial finance and raising questions about the viability of microfinance organizations (MFOs). To understand how microfinance persists despite such use, we conducted an embedded case study of a South African MFO operating in a rural, resource‐constrained context shaped by Ubuntu – a communitarian ethic emphasizing relational interdependence and mutual care. Drawing on scarcity theory and a practice‐based view of financial resourcing, we show how scarcity is collectively navigated through culturally embedded practices that stabilize loan‐use ambiguity in everyday microfinance interactions. We find that loan officers and recipients jointly enact three harmonizing practices – reverence for repayment, empathic financial support, and entrepreneurial discretion – that sustain this ambiguity between the MFO's espoused entrepreneurial schema and enacted livelihood‐oriented practices. Through these practices, microfinance remains viable as a community‐embedded system of financial support, even as loan use departs from formal entrepreneurial prescriptions. By conceptualizing microfinance as a community‐embedded system of financial resourcing rather than a narrowly entrepreneurial intervention, this study contributes to research on microfinance, scarcity, and resourcing in communitarian settings.
title_cn: 同一个硬币的两面：通过协调实践来维持小额信贷使用的模糊性
abstract_cn: 摘要 尽管微型金融被寄予通过创业减轻贫困的希望，但它在很大程度上被用于家庭目的，这挑战了西方关于微型金融作为创业融资的假设，并引发了对微型金融组织（MFO）可行性的质疑。为了理解微型金融如何在这种使用背景下依然存在，我们对在受乌班图影响的资源受限的农村环境中运作的一家南非微型金融机构进行了嵌入式案例研究。我们借助稀缺理论和基于实践的金融资源视角，展示了如何通过文化嵌入的实践共同应对稀缺，从而在日常微型金融互动中稳定贷款使用的模糊性。研究发现，贷款官员与借款人共同实施三种协调实践——对偿还的尊重、富有同情心的财政支持和创业自由裁量权——以维持微型金融机构所宣称的创业框架与实际生活导向实践之间的模糊关系。通过这些实践，微型金融作为一种嵌入社区的金融支持系统仍然可行，尽管贷款用途偏离了正式的创业规范。本研究通过将微型金融概念化为嵌入社区的金融资源系统，而不是狭义的创业干预，为微型金融、稀缺和社区环境中的资源研究作出了贡献。

title: EXPRESS: Competitive Markovian Pricing
abstract: Dynamic pricing is often complicated by strategic customer behavior. One tactic utilized by retailers to manage strategic customer behavior, known as Markovian pricing, is to offer price discounts at random intervals to prevent customers from predicting when the next discount will occur, thereby simplifying their strategic waiting behavior. In this paper, we study Markovian pricing in competitive settings. We show that retailers can effectively adopt Markovian pricing in competitive environments, establish the optimality of flash discounts under competitive Markovian pricing, and find surprisingly that increased levels of competition may benefit both retailers. We confirm the robustness of these insights and also establish their limits of applicability in two model extensions. Our findings suggest that retailers engaging in competitive Markovian pricing should refrain from naïvely applying common wisdom toward third-party price-monitoring and comparison services and reconsider the efforts in growing their loyal customer base, and more broadly highlight the unique properties of competitive Markovian pricing.
title_cn: 竞争性马尔可夫定价
abstract_cn: 动态定价常常受到战略性顾客行为的影响。零售商为应对战略性顾客行为采取的一种战术，被称为马尔可夫定价，即在随机时间节点提供价格折扣，以防顾客预判下一次折扣何时出现，从而简化其战略性等待行为。本文研究了竞争环境中的马尔可夫定价。我们表明，零售商可以在竞争环境中有效地采用马尔可夫定价，并确定了在竞争性马尔可夫定价下闪购折扣的最优性，令人意外的是，竞争加剧可能对两者零售商都有利。我们验证了这些发现的稳健性，同时在两个模型扩展中确立了它们的适用性界限。我们的研究结果表明，参与竞争性马尔可夫定价的零售商应避免天真地应用关于第三方价格监测和比较服务的通用智慧，重新考虑扩大其忠实顾客基础的努力，并更广泛地强调竞争性马尔可夫定价的独特特性。

title: EXPRESS: When Does Skewness Matter in Robust Inventory Management?
abstract: We investigate the impact of skewed demand on robust inventory management. Including skewness in calculations leads to cubic constraints that prevent the standard two-stage method from deriving an explicit and tractable objective function. To overcome this roadblock, we propose a joint optimization method to directly derive the robust solution in closed form. The joint optimization method is widely applicable to various robust inventory models with different ambiguity sets. The notable advantage is that we can obtain the final solution without deriving the objective function, so many tedious intermediate steps are circumvented. We conduct numerical experiments on industry data to demonstrate that our moment-based policies deliver more consistent performance than divergence-based policies. After obtaining various closed-form solutions, we demonstrate that including skewness in the model improves the profit generated by the robust optimal order quantity if either demand is bounded or the cost-to-price ratio is low, even though the sample moments used may not equal the population moments. Furthermore, under these conditions in which skewness should be included in the calculations, the firm’s expected profit, under the most unfavorable distribution, increases with variance but decreases with skewness. This result stands in contrast to findings in the economics and finance literature, where distributional ambiguity is not considered.
title_cn: 偏态性在稳健库存管理中何时重要？
abstract_cn: 我们探讨了偏斜需求对稳健库存管理的影响。将偏斜度纳入计算会导致三次约束，这使得标准的两阶段方法无法推导出明确且易处理的目标函数。为了解决这一障碍，我们提出了一种联合优化方法，以直接以封闭形式推导稳健解。该联合优化方法广泛适用于不同模糊集合的各种稳健库存模型。其显著优势在于，我们可以在不推导目标函数的情况下获得最终解，从而避免了许多繁琐的中间步骤。我们基于行业数据进行数值实验，证明我们的基于时刻的策略相比于基于发散的策略提供了更一致的表现。在获得各种封闭形式的解之后，我们展示了在需求是有限的或成本与价格比率较低的情况下，将偏斜度纳入模型能够提高稳健最优订购量所产生的利润，即使使用的样本时刻可能与总体时刻不相等。此外，在这些需要将偏斜度纳入计算的条件下，企业在最不利分布下的预期利润随着方差的增加而增加，但随着偏斜度的增加而减少。这个结果与经济学和金融文献中的发现形成对比，后者并未考虑分布模糊性。

title: Seeking, Shaping, Becoming: A Scoping Review of the Organizational Futures Literature
abstract: Across management disciplines, there is growing recognition that understanding organizational futures—that is, how organizations engage with futures—is integral to comprehending contemporary organizing and strategizing processes. In this paper, we conduct an in-depth scoping review aimed at organizing and synthesizing the rapidly expanding and fragmented literature on organizational futures across the strategy, entrepreneurship, innovation, and organization studies disciplines over the past several decades. Our survey identifies several research streams in these areas that we classify into three main categories: future seeking, shaping, and becoming. Furthermore, we identify three subcategories within each main group—anticipating, adapting, and non-adapting under future seeking; enacting, designing, and narrating within future shaping; and perpetuating, making/performing, and wayfinding/improvising inside future becoming—and review the key scholarship associated with each of these. In so doing, we provide a comprehensive and coherent map intended to enable this recently flourishing and perennially vital domain of research to move forward systematically. We also envision our review as a platform that facilitates the development of more prospectively-oriented (i.e., forward-looking) theorizing. Finally, we highlight many frontiers to explore in future work, that include more closely examining the role played by imagination, power and affect in the emergence of organizational futures.
title_cn: 探索、塑造、成为：组织未来文献的范围评估
abstract_cn: 在管理学科中，人们越来越认识到理解组织未来——即组织如何与未来互动——对于理解当代组织和战略制定过程至关重要。本文进行了一项深入的范围评估，旨在对近几十年来在战略、创业、创新和组织研究领域迅速扩展且相对分散的组织未来文献进行整理和综合。我们的调查识别出这些领域中的几个研究流向，并将其分类为三个主要类别：寻求未来、塑造未来和成为未来。此外，我们在每个主要类别中识别出三个子类别——在寻求未来中有预期、适应和非适应；在塑造未来中有实施、设计和叙述；在成为未来中有延续、创造/表现和寻找道/即兴——并审视与每个子类别相关的主要学术研究。通过这些努力，我们提供了一个全面而连贯的地图，旨在使这个近年来蓬勃发展且始终重要的研究领域能够系统地向前推进。我们还设想我们的评估作为一个平台，促进更具前瞻性（即面向未来）的理论发展。最后，我们强调了未来研究中需要探索的许多前沿，包括更深入地考察想象力、权力和情感在组织未来的形成中所发挥的作用。

title: Generative AI Models as Wicked Resources: A Dynamic Perspective on Resource Governance
abstract: The proliferation of generative AI models fundamentally alters organizational capabilities, enabling novel value creation while challenging incumbent governance frameworks. Employing a phenomenon-driven approach, this study integrates and extends property rights theory (PRT) and stakeholder resource-based theory (SRBT) to address governance challenges posed by generative AI. By leveraging system dynamics modeling, we conceptualize the dynamic interplay among stakeholder claims, institutional arrangements, and value appropriation outcomes, highlighting how feedback loops, delays, and accumulations shape these interactions. Our analysis reveals two insights: First, stable equilibrium states in stakeholder claims and property rights arrangements may not invariably lead to equitable outcomes, due to stakeholder power disparities and attribution ambiguity associated with generative AI. Second, framing the evolution of generative AI models as organizational resources from the complementary perspectives of PRT and SRBT reveals distinct resource features largely unexamined in the strategy literature. Hence, we introduce the concept of “wicked resources,” characterizing generative AI models by their inherent attribution ambiguity and emergent unpredictability. Building on prior research on resource complexity and uncertainty in the strategy literature, wicked resources are marked by the difficulty firms face in delineating and enforcing control within shifting sociopolitical contexts. This paper makes three key contributions: addressing the dynamic, multi-stakeholder nature of generative AI governance; introducing wicked resources as a novel resource category in strategy and management literatures; and identifying theoretical gaps, advocating for a dynamic, systemic approach to property rights and stakeholder bargaining.
topics: Ethics and Social Impacts of AI
title_cn: 生成式人工智能模型作为复杂资源：资源治理的动态视角
abstract_cn: 生成性人工智能模型的快速发展从根本上改变了组织能力，既推动了新价值的创造，又对现有的治理框架提出了挑战。本研究采用现象驱动的方法，整合并扩展了产权理论（PRT）和利益相关者资源基础理论（SRBT），以应对生成性人工智能所带来的治理挑战。通过利用系统动力学建模，我们概念化了利益相关者索求、制度安排与价值获取结果之间的动态互动，强调反馈循环、延迟和积累如何塑造这些互动。我们的分析揭示了两个重要观点：首先，由于利益相关者权力不平衡和生成性人工智能所带来的归属模糊性，利益相关者索求和产权安排中的稳定均衡状态不一定会导致公平结果。其次，从互补的产权理论和利益相关者资源基础理论的视角，将生成性人工智能模型的发展框架视为组织资源，揭示了战略文献中很大程度上未被研究的独特资源特征。因此，我们引入了“顽固资源”的概念，以其固有的归属模糊性和新兴的不确定性来表征生成性人工智能模型。基于战略文献中对资源复杂性和不确定性的先前研究，顽固资源的一个标志是企业在不断变化的社会政治背景中难以明确和执行控制。本文做出了三项重要贡献：应对生成性人工智能治理的动态多利益相关者特性；引入顽固资源作为战略与管理文献中的新资源类别；识别理论空白，呼吁采取动态系统的方法来处理产权和利益相关者的博弈。

title: Persuasion in the political marketplace: How firms snitch on rivals to encourage regulatory enforcement
abstract: Abstract Research Summary We study an important, but largely overlooked, non‐market strategy used by firms in the enforcement stage of policy: “snitching,” that is, providing intelligence about potential violations of their rivals in an attempt to persuade regulators to fine them. Building on political marketplace theory, we develop and test a theoretical model of how firms use snitching during regulatory enforcement. We show that in equilibrium, firms snitch when the rival's violations are likely to cause significant harm to the population. We then derive several boundary conditions outlining when firms will engage in more or less snitching. We find support for our theory in panel data on enforcement actions by the U.S. Environmental Protection Agency for more than 8000 facilities over 12 years. Managerial Summary Firms can use their corporate political activity (CPA) not only to help themselves, but also to snitch on their rivals. Using a formal model, we look at how CPA influences regulatory enforcement. We find firms are most likely to snitch on their rivals when their rivals' potential violations are likely to cause significant harm, since this is when regulators care the most. Our model also outlines when this is most and least likely to occur. We then test our theory using data from the U.S. Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) and find support for our claims. The EPA is more likely to fine facilities for infractions that process many toxic chemicals, but this effect is much greater when a firm's rivals are actively lobbying the EPA.
title_cn: 政治市场中的说服：企业如何揭发竞争对手以促进监管执行
abstract_cn: 摘要 研究总结 我们研究了一种重要但被忽视的非市场策略，该策略在政策的执行阶段被企业采用：即“告密”，即提供关于竞争对手潜在违规行为的情报，以试图说服监管机构对其处以罚款。在政治市场理论的基础上，我们开发并测试了一个理论模型，探讨企业在监管执行过程中如何利用告密。我们的研究表明，在平衡状态下，企业在竞争对手的违规行为可能对公众造成重大伤害时会选择告密。随后，我们推导出几个边界条件，概述了企业何时会更多或更少地进行告密。我们在关于美国环保署对超过8000家设施在12年内的执法行动的面板数据中找到了对我们理论的支持。管理摘要 企业可以利用其企业政治活动（CPA）不仅帮助自身，还可以告发竞争对手。通过一个正式模型，我们探讨了CPA如何影响监管执法。我们的发现表明，当竞争对手的潜在违规行为可能造成重大危害时，企业最有可能告密，因为这是监管机构最为关注的时刻。我们的模型还概述了这种情况何时最有可能以及何时最不可能发生。随后，我们使用来自美国环保署（EPA）的数据测试了我们的理论，并找到了对我们论点的支持。EPA更有可能对涉及许多有毒化学物质的设施进行罚款，但当企业的竞争对手积极向EPA游说时，这种效果会更为显著。

title: The Interactive Impact of Regulation, Entrepreneurship, and Cultural Values on Technology Adoption: Renewable Energy in the EU
abstract: Abstract How can diverse sources legitimize new technology when it lacks economic parity? Government policies that endorse nascent technologies play a central role through regulatory legitimation. Yet, we know less about whether inducement policies that incentivize adoption or imposition policies that mandate it are more effective, and how that effectiveness depends on other sources of legitimation. We address this question by examining renewable energy adoption by incumbent electric utilities in the European Union from 1998 to 2009, a period when renewable energy had not yet achieved cost parity with fossil‐fuel alternatives. We find that inducement policies were generally more effective than imposition policies in fostering adoption. Further, entrepreneurial entry strengthened the impact of inducement policies through pragmatic legitimation, while pro‐environment cultural values strengthened the impact of imposition policies through normative legitimation. By showing how regulatory, pragmatic, and normative legitimation sources interact to shape technology adoption, we offer insights for accelerating technology transitions aimed at combating grand challenges such as climate change.
title_cn: 规制、创业和文化价值观对技术采纳的互动影响：欧盟的可再生能源
abstract_cn: 摘要 源于不同背景的多元化来源如何在新技术缺乏经济平价时为其合法化提供支持？政府政策在通过监管合法化方面扮演着核心角色，但我们对刺激采纳的诱导政策和强制采纳的施行政策哪种更为有效，以及这种有效性如何受其他合法化来源影响的了解较少。我们通过考察1998至2009年间欧盟既有电力公用事业对可再生能源的采纳，来探讨这个问题。在此期间，可再生能源尚未达到与化石燃料替代品的成本平价。我们的研究发现，诱导政策在促进采纳方面通常比施行政策更有效。此外，企业的进入通过务实合法化增强了诱导政策的影响，而环保文化价值观则通过规范合法化增强了施行政策的影响。通过展示监管、务实和规范合法化来源之间的互动如何塑造技术采纳，我们为加速旨在应对气候变化等重大挑战的技术转型提供了洞见。

title: AI-powered risk mitigation and organizational sensemaking for supply chain resilience
abstract: Purpose This study aims to examine the integrated impact of artificial intelligence (AI)-powered supply chain risk management (AISCRM), autonomous resilience (AR), organizational sensemaking (OS) and supply chain resilience (SCR) on enhancing US manufacturing supply chain resilience during digital transformation, thereby addressing a critical gap in the current literature. Design/methodology/approach Utilizing a quantitative approach, the research collected data from 741 respondents across 27 US states, representing 100 manufacturers in automotive, aerospace, electronics and industrial manufacturing sectors. The study used systematic random sampling via SurveyMonkey, distributing questionnaires to 1,900 employees. Structural equation modeling was used to test hypotheses linking AISCRM, AR, OS and SCR, grounded in the dynamic capability view (DCV). Findings The results confirm that AISCRM has a positive influence on AR (H1); AR enhances OS (H2) and SCR (H3); OS has a positive effect on SCR (H4); and OS mediates the relationship between AR and SCR (H5). These findings highlight the synergistic role of AI-driven autonomy and human sensemaking in fostering resilience, with significant implications for diverse manufacturing contexts. Practical implications Manufacturers can leverage AISCRM and AR to enhance autonomous recovery, while OS can guide strategic adaptations to reduce the $50bn annual loss from supply chain disruptions. This provides actionable strategies for large, digitally intensive manufacturers to enhance their competitiveness. Originality/value To the best of the authors’ knowledge, this research is among the first to empirically integrate AISCRM, AR, OS and SCR, addressing a gap identified in recent studies, providing a holistic framework for resilience in the digital era, and contributing to both theory and practice in manufacturing supply chain management.
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
title_cn: 基于人工智能的风险缓解与组织认知在供应链韧性中的应用
abstract_cn: 目的 本研究旨在探讨人工智能（AI）驱动的供应链风险管理（AISCRM）、自主韧性（AR）、组织意义构建（OS）和供应链韧性（SCR）在数字转型过程中对增强美国制造业供应链韧性的综合影响，从而填补当前文献中的一个重要空白。 设计/方法论/接近 采用定量研究方法，研究从美国27个州的741名受访者处收集数据，涵盖汽车、航空航天、电子和工业制造等100家制造商。研究通过SurveyMonkey进行了系统随机抽样，向1,900名员工分发问卷。使用结构方程模型检验AISCRM、AR、OS和SCR之间的假设，研究基于动态能力视角（DCV）。 研究结果 结果确认AISCRM对AR有积极影响（H1）；AR提升OS（H2）和SCR（H3）；OS对SCR有正面影响（H4）；OS在AR与SCR之间的关系中起到中介作用（H5）。这些发现突显了AI驱动的自主性与人类意义构建在促进韧性方面的协同作用，对多样化的制造背景具有重要意义。 实际意义 制造商可以利用AISCRM和AR来增强自主恢复能力，而OS可以指导战略调整，以减少每年500亿美元的供应链中断损失。这为大型数字化密集型制造商提供了可操作的策略，以增强它们的竞争力。 原创性/价值 据笔者所知，本研究是首次实证性整合AISCRM、AR、OS和SCR的研究，填补了近期研究中识别的空白，提供了数字时代韧性的整体框架，并为制造供应链管理的理论与实践做出了贡献。

title: How Do Firms Develop Safety Management Capabilities? The Impact of Institutional Forces and Digital Technology Resources
abstract: ABSTRACT In the digital age, industrial firms are facing significant challenges in achieving digitally‐enabled safety management (DSM, i.e., leveraging digital technologies to mitigate industrial accidents) due to rigid institutional structures and underutilized digital technology resources. To address this, we develop a research model integrating institutional theory and resource‐based view theory, and position safety management capabilities (i.e., the abilities of a firm to sense, seize, and reconfigure its safety operational routines and deploy new ones for DSM) as a pivotal process mechanism translating institutional forces (i.e., institutional isomorphism and top management support for DSM) and digital technology resources (i.e., digital technologies that are available and utilized for DSM) into improved safety performance. Using time‐lagged survey data in combination with secondary data from 216 industrial firms in China, our findings reveal that institutional isomorphism and top management support exert cascading influences on safety management capabilities. The alignment of digital technology resources with institutional forces significantly facilitates the development of safety management capabilities, emphasizing their synergistic role in fostering adaptive and strategic safety practices. Furthermore, safety management capabilities serve as the critical intermediary enabling institutional and resource factors to drive superior safety outcomes. Our results advance the theory of safety management and provide actionable insights for industrial firms to effectively operationalize DSM.
title_cn: 企业如何发展安全管理能力？制度力量与数字技术资源的影响
abstract_cn: 摘要 在数字时代，工业企业在实现数字化安全管理（DSM，即利用数字技术减轻工业事故）方面面临重大挑战，这主要由于僵化的制度结构和未充分利用的数字技术资源。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了一个整合制度理论和资源基础观点的研究模型，并将安全管理能力（即企业感知、把握和重构其安全操作流程以及部署新流程以实现DSM的能力）定位为一个关键的过程机制，这一机制将制度力量（即制度同质化和高层管理对DSM的支持）与数字技术资源（即可用且用于DSM的数字技术）转化为改善的安全绩效。通过结合时间滞后调查数据与来自中国216家工业企业的二手数据，我们的研究结果表明，制度同质化和高层管理支持对安全管理能力产生级联影响。数字技术资源与制度力量的一致性显著促进了安全管理能力的发展，强调了它们在推动适应性和战略性安全实践中的协同作用。此外，安全管理能力作为关键中介，使制度和资源因素能够推动优越的安全结果。我们的研究结果推动了安全管理理论的发展，并为工业企业有效执行DSM提供了可操作的见解。

title: Organizing across cognitive asymmetry in human–AI collaboration: A study of perfume creation
abstract: Abstract Research Summary As organizations increasingly adopt generative AI (GenAI), they face a strategic challenge: not only deciding which tasks AI should perform, but also how to organize the integration of human and AI efforts to produce viable solutions. We propose that a cognitive asymmetry between human's tacit, embodied knowledge and AI's codified knowledge creates a representational gap that complicates human–GenAI collaboration. Through a qualitative study of professional perfume creation, we identify representational integration as an organizing process through which humans and GenAI coordinate to bridge this gap. This process unfolds across three practices: allocating tasks based on cognitive advantages, converting knowledge across tacit and codified forms, and steering GenAI outputs as problem solving evolves. This study advances a novel organizing perspective on human–GenAI collaboration under conditions of cognitive asymmetry. Managerial Summary Organizations increasingly deploy GenAI in knowledge‐intensive work, yet many struggle to convert human and AI contributions into strategic value. This study takes a cognitive lens, showing that humans and GenAI rely on different forms of cognition—and that value emerges when organizations can coordinate and combine them. Successful human–GenAI collaboration therefore requires more than adopting powerful models. It depends on organizing practices that help employees translate across representational formats, relate GenAI outputs to embodied expertise, and iteratively steer GenAI as their interpretations evolve. Investing in these practices and skills allows organizations to harness GenAI's generativity while recognizing that human sensemaking, tacit knowledge, and contextual understanding remain indispensable for producing coherent, high‐quality outcomes.

title_cn: 跨越认知不对称的人机协作组织：香水创作研究
abstract_cn: 摘要 研究总结 随着组织越来越多地采用生成性人工智能（GenAI），它们面临着一个战略挑战：不仅要决定哪些任务由AI来执行，还要如何组织人类与AI的整合，以产生可行的解决方案。我们提出，人类的隐性、具身知识与AI的编码知识之间的认知不对称造成了一种表征差距，从而使得人类与GenAI的协作变得复杂。通过对专业香水创作的定性研究，我们确定了表征整合作为一种组织过程，借此人类与GenAI协调以弥合这一差距。该过程通过三种实践展开：根据认知优势分配任务、在隐性与编码知识之间转换知识，以及随着问题解决的演变引导GenAI输出。本研究在认知不对称的条件下，为人类与GenAI协作提供了一个新的组织视角。 管理总结 组织越来越多地在知识密集型工作中部署GenAI，但许多组织在将人类和AI的贡献转化为战略价值方面仍然面临困难。本研究采用认知视角，展示了人类与GenAI依赖不同形式的认知，并且当组织能够协调和结合这些认知时，价值就会显现。因此，成功的人类与GenAI协作不仅需要采用强大的模型，还依赖于组织实践，这些实践帮助员工在表征格式之间进行转换，将GenAI输出与具身专业知识联系起来，并在其解释不断演变的过程中对GenAI进行迭代引导。投资于这些实践和技能使组织能够利用GenAI的生成能力，同时认识到人类的意义构建、隐性知识和情境理解在产生连贯、高质量结果方面仍然不可或缺。

title: Listen to Your Users? Self-Selection in User Community Feedback and Commercial Impact
abstract: Firms increasingly involve user communities in product development, and prior research documents many benefits in idea generation, knowledge sharing, and cost reduction. We theorize, however, that incorporating market feedback about products from these communities can harm products’ commercial performance. Because community feedback is volunteered by self-selected participants rather than sampled to represent the broader market, it may mislead firms when narrow community preferences diverge from mainstream demand. We predict that greater incorporation of community feedback will increase positive evaluations of a product within the community, but undermine its broader commercial success when there are strong user self-selection pressures (like for initially niche-targeted games). We test this theory in the personal-computer (PC) video-game industry using Steam Early Access, where developers integrate community feedback prior to release. Using a multimethod design that combines large-scale archival analyses with interviews of developers, executives, and community members, we find that feedback incorporation during Early Access improves post-launch commercial outcomes of games only when the Early Access community closely mirrors the distribution of users in the broader Steam market. However, in unrepresentative communities—even large ones—greater incorporation predicts lower post-launch revenues despite favorable community evaluations.
title_cn: 倾听用户的声音？用户社区反馈中的自我选择及其商业影响
abstract_cn: 企业越来越多地让用户社区参与产品开发，而之前的研究记录了在创意生成、知识共享和成本降低等方面的诸多好处。然而，我们理论上认为，从这些社区获取的市场反馈可能会对产品的商业表现产生不利影响。因为社区反馈是由自我选择的参与者自愿提供的，而不是通过抽样来代表更广泛的市场，所以当狭隘的社区偏好与主流需求不一致时，可能会误导企业。我们预测，更多地采纳社区反馈将增加社区内部对产品的正面评价，但在强烈的用户自我选择压力下（例如针对最初小众市场的游戏），却会削弱其更广泛的商业成功。我们在个人电脑（PC）视频游戏产业中检验这一理论，利用Steam早期访问（Early Access）平台，在发布之前，开发者整合社区反馈。通过将大规模档案分析与开发者、高管和社区成员的访谈相结合的多重方法设计，我们发现，在早期访问期间，反馈整合只有在早期访问社区与更广泛的Steam市场用户分布紧密相似时，才能改善游戏的发布后商业结果。然而，在代表性不足的社区中——即使是大型社区——更多的反馈整合反而预测发布后收入降低，尽管社区评价仍然积极。

title: AI in science: When and where it makes a difference
abstract: Why do some scientific fields benefit far more from AI than others? To answer this question, we study the diffusion and effects of AI across more than 170 scientific fields between 2005 and 2023, drawing on a dataset of over 80 million scientific publications, and assessing its contribution to knowledge creation using indicators of novelty and impact. We find that, on average, the use of AI is associated with more novel and highly cited research, and that these effects are strengthened with recent technological advances (namely, transformers and large language models). However, these benefits are far from uniform. The contribution of AI, especially in terms of novelty, intensifies with its penetration within a field, that is, the extent to which AI is widely adopted and embedded in research practices, and with the “roughness” of the underlying knowledge space, meaning the degree to which ideas are fragmented and combinatorially complex. • AI positively contributes to scientific novelty and impact. • Effects strengthened with recent AI advances. • Effects are uneven across 170+ fields. • The contribution of AI intensifies with its penetration within a field. • Strongest gains occur in fragmented (“rough”) knowledge spaces.
topics: Artificial Intelligence in Healthcare and Education
title_cn: 科学中的人工智能：何时何地产生影响
abstract_cn: 为什么某些科学领域比其他领域更能从人工智能中受益？为了解答这个问题，我们研究了2005年至2023年间人工智能在170多个科学领域的传播和影响，基于超过8000万篇科学出版物的数据集，并通过新颖性和影响力指标评估其对知识创造的贡献。我们发现，平均而言，人工智能的使用与更具新颖性和高引用率的研究相关，而且这些效果随着近期技术进步（即变换器和大型语言模型）的出现而增强。然而，这些好处并非均匀分布。人工智能的贡献，尤其是在新颖性方面，随着其在某一领域的渗透程度而加剧，即人工智能在研究实践中的广泛采用和嵌入程度，以及基础知识空间的“粗糙度”，即思想的碎片化和组合复杂性程度。 • 人工智能对科学新颖性和影响力有积极贡献。 • 随着近期人工智能进展，效果得到了增强。 • 170多个领域的效果不均衡。 • 人工智能的贡献随着其在某一领域的渗透程度而加剧。 • 在碎片化（“粗糙”）知识空间中，收益最为显著。

title: Tax avoidance and ESG disclosure mandates: international evidence
abstract: Abstract This paper examines how regulations mandating environmental, social, and governance (ESG) disclosure affect corporate tax behavior. Using a difference-in-differences analysis on a sample of firms from 48 countries, we find that ESG disclosure mandates lead to significant reductions in tax avoidance, with stronger effects for mandates that include tax-relevant provisions. We identify increases in ESG information transparency and improvements in firms’ ESG performance as channels through which ESG disclosure mandates reduce tax avoidance. We further find that the decrease in tax avoidance following ESG disclosure mandates is more pronounced in countries with weaker financial disclosure requirements, legal and tax enforcement, and environmental and social institutions. Collectively, the evidence suggests that non-financial disclosure regulations can curb aggressive tax behavior, supporting broader goals of corporate accountability and sustainable development.
title_cn: 避税与ESG信息披露要求：国际证据
abstract_cn: 摘要 本文研究了强制环境、社会和治理（ESG）信息披露的法规如何影响企业的税收行为。通过对来自48个国家的公司样本进行差异中的差异分析，我们发现ESG信息披露的强制要求显著减少了税务规避，其中包括与税务相关条款的强制要求产生的影响更为显著。我们识别出ESG信息透明度的提升和公司ESG表现的改善是ESG信息披露强制要求减少税务规避的渠道。此外，我们还发现，在财务信息披露要求较弱、法律和税务执法力度不足以及环境与社会机构不健全的国家，ESG信息披露强制要求后税务规避的减少现象更为明显。总体而言，证据表明，非财务信息披露法规可以遏制激进的税务行为，支持企业问责和可持续发展的更广泛目标。

title: Silent struggle: How older employees’ relational age and voice behavior shape co-worker trust and performance in professional teams
abstract: How do older employees maintain trust and demonstrate value in age-diverse teams where seniority does not confer authority? In flat-structured teams where members hold similar titles, younger employees may question why older colleagues have not advanced, creating status incongruence and lowering trust in their ability. Drawing on status characteristics theory, we argue that older employees’ relational age (i.e. the average age difference from their younger peers) can be negatively associated with co-worker trust and task performance. We further propose that older employees’ voice behavior mitigates the negative effects of relational age. In Study 1, using a round-robin survey design with 199 employees across 56 Taiwanese teams, we find that voice moderates the negative relationship between relational age and co-worker trust, as well as the indirect effect on supervisor-rated performance. In Study 2, a vignette experiment with 177 Australian participants, relational age reduced trust via lower perceived competence (but not warmth), and this effect was eliminated when the older worker displayed voice. Our research shows how age-based status beliefs can be challenged in professional teams, contributing to scholarship on workplace stereotyping, intragroup status hierarchies, and proactive strategies in age-diverse teams, while offering practical guidance for sustaining older employees’ careers.
title_cn: 无声的斗争：年长员工的关系年龄与发声行为如何影响专业团队中的同事信任与表现
abstract_cn: 在缺乏权威的情况下，老年员工如何在年龄多样化的团队中维护信任并展示价值？在扁平结构的团队中，成员职称相似，年轻员工可能会质疑老年同事为何没有晋升，从而产生地位不一致感并降低对他们能力的信任。基于地位特征理论，我们认为老年员工的关系年龄（即与年轻同事的平均年龄差）可能与同事信任和任务表现呈负相关。此外，我们进一步提出，老年员工的发声行为能够减轻关系年龄的负面影响。在研究1中，我们使用了包含199名员工的56个台湾团队的轮次调查设计，发现发声行为在关系年龄与同事信任之间的负向关系以及对主管评价表现的间接效应中起到了调节作用。在研究2中，我们进行了一项包含177名澳大利亚参与者的情境实验，结果显示关系年龄通过降低感知能力（而不是温暖感）来减少信任，而当老年员工表现出发声时，这一效应被消除。我们的研究展示了如何在专业团队中挑战基于年龄的地位信念，为职场刻板印象、组内地位等级以及在年龄多样化团队中的主动策略提供了学术贡献，同时为支持老年员工的职业发展提供了实用指导。

title: How to not change the world: Actionism and pseudo-praxis in organization and management theory
abstract: Critical research is facing calls for practical relevance through academic activism, affirmation of alternatives, collaboration with practitioners and critical performativity, with earlier traditions of critique dismissed as being negative, detached, and ineffective. This paper challenges this framing by returning to debates within Frankfurt School critical theory, particularly Theodor Adorno’s analysis of ‘thinking actionism’ – that is, a form of self-defeating critique based on a prioritization of practice, naïve optimism, faith in collectivity, and academic self-aggrandizement. Using this theoretical lens, we problematize trends within recent practice-oriented and impact-focused critical scholarship and offer three provocations. First, we caution against equating critique with practice and impact and dismissing critical theory. Second, we highlight the indirect and often unintended influence of critical theory on practice and revisit Frankfurt School approaches – such as immanent critique and negative dialectics – as theoretical resources that advance the relation between theory and practice. Finally, we evaluate examples of intellectual engagements that illustrate the potential for this more dialectical approach to politics and organizing.
title_cn: 如何不改变世界：组织与管理理论中的行动主义与伪实践
abstract_cn: 批判性研究面临着通过学术行动主义、确认替代方案、与从业者的合作以及批判性表现力等方式实现实际相关性的呼声，早期的批判传统则被视为负面、脱离现实和无效的。这篇论文通过回归法兰克福学派批判理论中的辩论，特别是西奥多·阿多诺对“思考行动主义”的分析，挑战了这种框架——即一种基于对实践的优先考虑、幼稚的乐观、对集体的信任以及学术自我膨胀的自我打击型批判形式。借助这一理论视角，我们对最近以实践为导向和关注影响的批判学术趋势进行问题化，并提出三项反思。首先，我们提醒不要将批判与实践和影响等同，亦不要轻视批判理论。其次，我们强调批判理论对实践的间接且常常是意想不到的影响，并重新审视法兰克福学派的方法——如内在批判和否定辩证法——作为推进理论与实践关系的理论资源。最后，我们评估一些智力参与的例子，这些例子展示了更辩证的政治和组织方法的潜力。

title: Labor Market Outcomes of Restatements for Corporate Accountants
abstract: Our study examines the impact of nonfraud financial restatements on the careers of corporate accountants. Using LinkedIn data, we identify a sample of accountants working at 201 firms that restated their financial statements between 2004 and 2014. We find that compared with human resource employees within the same company or corporate accountants in matched control firms, accountants in restatement firms, particularly senior staff, have a higher rate of departure and a lower probability of moving to a higher-ranked position outside the company after a restatement is announced. Using a longer job search period as a measure of being forced to leave, we find that the higher departure rate for senior accountants is because of being forced out rather than leaving voluntarily. The higher departure rates occur only for accountants working at firms with more severe restatements. In a separate sample of firms that restate financial statements because of clerical errors, we do not find higher departure rates for accountants after the restatement is revealed. Our results suggest that senior accountants in restatement firms experience negative outcomes in the labor market. This paper was accepted by Suraj Srinivasan, accounting. Funding: J. (X.) Jiang acknowledges research support from the Eli Broad College of Business. M. Shen acknowledges financial support from the NUS Start-up Grant [Grant A-0003914-00-00] and the Singapore MOE Tier-1 Grant [Grant A-8000098-00-00]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2021.00430 .
title_cn: 企业会计人员财务重述的劳动市场结果
abstract_cn: 本研究考察了非欺诈性财务重述对企业会计师职业生涯的影响。通过使用LinkedIn数据，我们识别出2004年至2014年间对财务报表进行了重述的201家公司的会计师样本。我们发现，与同一公司的人力资源员工或匹配对照公司中的企业会计师相比，重述公司的会计师，尤其是高级员工，在重述公告后离职率更高，且转向公司外部更高职位的概率更低。以较长的求职时间作为被迫离职的衡量标准，我们发现高级会计师的高离职率是由于被迫离开，而非自愿离职。只有在重述更为严重的公司中，高离职率才会出现。在一个单独的样本中，我们考察了因文书错误而重述财务报表的公司，结果发现重述公布后会计师的离职率并没有明显增加。我们的结果表明，重述公司的高级会计师在劳动力市场上面临负面后果。本文已被会计学的Suraj Srinivasan接受。资助：J. (X.) Jiang感谢Eli Broad商学院的研究支持。M. Shen感谢新加坡国立大学启动资金[资助编号A-0003914-00-00]和新加坡教育部Tier-1资助[资助编号A-8000098-00-00]的财务支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2021.00430获取。

title: Measuring the Driving Forces of Predictive Performance: Application to Credit Scoring
abstract: Because they play an increasingly important role in determining access to credit, credit scoring models are under growing scrutiny from banking supervisors and internal model validators. These authorities need to monitor the model performance and identify its key drivers. To facilitate this, we introduce the explainable performance (XPER) methodology to decompose a performance metric (e.g., area under the curve (AUC), [Formula: see text]) into specific contributions associated with the various features of a forecasting model. XPER is theoretically grounded on Shapley values and is both model-agnostic and performance metric-agnostic. Furthermore, it can be implemented either at the model level or at the individual level. Using a novel data set of car loans, we decompose the AUC of a machine-learning model trained to forecast the default probability of loan applicants. We show that a small number of features can explain a surprisingly large part of the model performance. Notably, the features that contribute the most to the predictive performance of the model may not be the ones that contribute the most to individual forecasts (Shapley additive explanation). Finally, we show how XPER can be used to deal with heterogeneity issues and improve performance. This paper was accepted by Kay Giesecke, finance. Funding: The authors thank the Institut Universitaire de France, the Autorité de contrôle prudentiel et de résolution Chair in Regulation and Systemic Risk, the HEC-Deloitte Chair on Artificial Intelligence for Business Innovation, the Excellence Initiative of Aix-Marseille University [A*MIDEX], and the French National Research Agency [Grants AMSE ANR-17-EURE-0020, Ecodec ANR-11-LABX-0047, and MLEforRisk ANR-21-CE26-0007] for supporting our research. Supplemental Material: The online appendices and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.02025 .
title_cn: 测量预测性能的驱动因素：应用于信用评分
abstract_cn: 由于信用评分模型在决定信贷获取方面扮演着越来越重要的角色，因此这些模型正受到银行监管机构和内部模型验证者的日益关注。这些机构需要监测模型的表现并识别其关键驱动因素。为此，我们引入了可解释性能（XPER）方法论，以将性能指标（例如，曲线下面积（AUC），[公式：见文本]）分解为与预测模型的各种特征相关的具体贡献。XPER 理论上基于夏普利值，且对模型和性能指标均不具特定依赖性。此外，它可以在模型层面或个体层面实施。利用一组新颖的汽车贷款数据集，我们分解了一个机器学习模型的 AUC，该模型旨在预测贷款申请人的违约概率。我们展示了少量特征能够解释模型性能中出乎意料的大部分。值得注意的是，对模型预测性能贡献最大的特征可能并不是对个体预测贡献最大的特征（夏普利加法解释）。最后，我们展示了如何使用 XPER 处理异质性问题并改善性能。本文已被凯·吉塞克（Kay Giesecke）接受，领域为金融。资助：作者感谢法国大学研究所、审慎监管与系统性风险委员会主席、HEC-德勤商业创新人工智能主席、艾克斯-马赛大学卓越计划 [A*MIDEX] 以及法国国家研究署 [资助编号 AMSE ANR-17-EURE-0020、Ecodec ANR-11-LABX-0047 和 MLEforRisk ANR-21-CE26-0007] 对我们研究的支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.02025 获取。

title: Firm-Level Litigation Risk: Measurement and Effects
abstract: Firms are exposed to litigation risk from various stakeholders, including investors, customers, and regulators, and prior research has shown that such risk shapes a range of corporate policies. In this study, we develop a simple and transparent measure of firm-level litigation risk by parsing SEC 10-K annual reports. This measure demonstrates strong predictability for lawsuits, even after controlling for firm characteristics, existing lawsuits, geographic factors, and various fixed effects, including firm fixed effects. This simple measure performs comparably to a more resource-intensive, AI-generated litigation risk measure. We further link our measure of litigation risk to a variety of corporate policies, including cash holdings, capital expenditures, R&D, and acquisitions, uncovering results consistent with the literature. This paper was accepted by Bo Becker, finance. Funding: C. Ham acknowledges financial support from the Blanche “Peg” Philpott Faculty Fellowship. Supplemental Material: The internet appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.05821 .
title_cn: 企业层面的诉讼风险：测量与影响
abstract_cn: 企业面临来自各类利益相关者的诉讼风险，包括投资者、客户和监管机构，先前的研究表明，这种风险会影响一系列企业政策。在本研究中，我们通过解析SEC 10-K年度报告，开发了一种简单透明的企业层面诉讼风险衡量指标。该指标在预测诉讼方面表现出强大的可预测性，即使在控制了企业特征、现有诉讼、地理因素以及各种固定效应（包括企业固定效应）后，依然有效。这个简单的指标与一种更为资源密集的、由人工智能生成的诉讼风险衡量指标表现相当。我们进一步将诉讼风险指标与多种企业政策联系起来，包括现金持有、资本支出、研发和收购，发现结果与文献一致。本文由Bo Becker（金融学）接受。资助：C. Ham感谢Blanche “Peg” Philpott教职员工奖学金的财务支持。补充材料：互联网附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.05821获取。

title: Executive Cooperativeness: Evidence from Conference Calls
abstract: Cooperativeness is essential to individual and organizational success. We exploit a unique feature of conference calls to study individual executives’ cooperativeness, indicated by their directly inviting colleagues to respond to analysts’ questions, and its relation with their career outcomes and firm performance. After validating our measure, we find that cooperativeness is associated with relevant executive characteristics. Older, more senior, and more experienced executives are more likely to display cooperativeness. We also find that cooperativeness persists but can be influenced by colleagues. Turning to the relation with career and firm outcomes, we find robust evidence of a positive association between cooperativeness and the likelihood of being promoted to chief executive officer (CEO). Appointing CEOs who are more cooperative than their predecessors is associated with an average three-day abnormal return of 0.6% around the announcement of the appointment. This paper was accepted by Ranjani Krishnan, accounting. Funding: W. Cai gratefully acknowledges financial support from the Bernstein Center for Leadership and Ethics of Columbia Business School. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.05902 .
title_cn: 高管合作性：来自电话会议的证据
abstract_cn: 合作精神对个人和组织的成功至关重要。我们利用会议电话的独特特征来研究个别高管的合作精神，这通过他们直接邀请同事回应分析师的问题来体现，并探讨其与职业结果和公司业绩的关系。在验证我们的测量方法后，我们发现合作精神与相关的高管特征存在关联。年龄较大、职务较高和经验更丰富的高管更可能表现出合作精神。我们还发现，合作精神是持续存在的，但可以受到同事的影响。关于职业和公司结果的关系，我们发现合作精神与晋升为首席执行官（CEO）的可能性之间存在显著的正相关关系。任命比其前任更具合作精神的CEO与任命公告时的平均三天异常收益率为0.6%相关联。本文由兰贾尼·克里希南（Ranjani Krishnan）接受，领域为会计。资助：蔡伟（W. Cai）衷心感谢哥伦比亚商学院伯恩斯坦领导力与伦理中心的财务支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.05902获取。

title: Dual Sourcing in an Assembly System: A Simple and Effective Critical-Set Base-Surge Policy
abstract: Coordinating Dual-Sourcing for Multi-Component Assembly Systems Assembly manufacturers are increasingly relying on dual sourcing—pairing a low-cost regular supplier with a faster but more expensive express option—to enhance supply chain resilience. Yet although dual sourcing is well understood for single items, managing it across multiple components in an assembly system has remained largely unresolved. In the paper, we introduce a novel Critical-Set Base-Surge (CSBS) policy, which combines a constant order policy for regular sources to meet base demand with a Critical-Set (CS) policy for express sources to handle surge demand. By revealing a weaker form of additive separability and proving exponential state convergence under CSBS, we provide a performance bound and establish asymptotic optimality as regular lead times grow. Numerical experiments show that, compared to benchmark policies that apply the Tailored Base-Surge policy, the CSBS policy achieves substantial optimality gap reductions. Furthermore, we propose a CSBS policy with easy-to-compute parameters and demonstrate that it delivers performance comparable with the CSBS policy.
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
title_cn: 组装系统中的双重采购：一种简单有效的关键集基础突发政策
abstract_cn: 协调多组件装配系统的双重采购 装配制造商越来越依赖双重采购——将低成本的常规供应商与更快但更昂贵的快速选项配对——以增强供应链的韧性。然而，尽管双重采购在单一物品的管理上已经得到很好的理解，但在装配系统中跨多个组件管理双重采购仍然基本未得到解决。本文提出了一种新颖的关键集基础激增（CSBS）政策，该政策结合了对常规来源的恒定订单政策以满足基础需求，以及对快速来源的关键集（CS）政策以应对激增需求。通过揭示一种较弱形式的可加分离性并证明在CSBS下的指数状态收敛，我们提供了性能界限并确立了当常规交货时间增长时的渐近最优性。数值实验表明，与应用定制基础激增政策的基准政策相比，CSBS政策显著减少了最优性差距。此外，我们提出了一种具有易于计算参数的CSBS政策，并证明其性能与CSBS政策相当。

title: EXPRESS: Far Apart, Slower Together: Employee Geographic Distance and Project Delay in Global New Product Development
abstract: Geographic dispersion is routine in new product development, yet it remains unclear whether employee geographic distance (EGD) slows project execution. We develop a coordination costs perspective in which employee geographic distance (EGD) is postulated to increase project delays because it raises attention allocation and information search costs. We test this framework by using a longitudinal employee–project–month panel from a large manufacturing firm that spans 9,729 observations across Europe, North America, and Asia. We find that greater geographic distance is associated with longer project delays, and that the effect is contingent on employee and project characteristics. The EGD–delay link is attenuated by employee familiarity and project similarity, consistent with lower attention allocation costs, and for specialist employees, consistent with differences in information search costs. We also find that the link is amplified for cross-functional geographic dispersion. Additional analyses document that the association between EGD and project delay is concentrated at later project gates and in high-risk or highly innovative projects. A difference-in-differences test around daylight-saving-time transitions indicates that temporal misalignment alone does not account for the EGD–delay relationship. Taken together, the results inform the literature on new product development, project management, and global work by demonstrating when geographic distance is most consequential for project delay.
title_cn: 表达：相距遥远，协作缓慢：员工地理距离与全球新产品开发中的项目延迟
abstract_cn: 地理分散在新产品开发中是常见现象，但员工地理距离（EGD）是否会减缓项目执行仍不明确。我们提出了一种协调成本视角，假设员工地理距离（EGD）会增加项目延误，因为它提高了注意力分配和信息搜索成本。我们通过使用来自一家大型制造公司的纵向员工-项目-月份面板数据进行测试，该数据涵盖了来自欧洲、北美和亚洲的9,729个观察值。我们的研究发现，较大的地理距离与更长的项目延误相关，并且这种影响依赖于员工和项目的特征。EGD与延误之间的联系受到员工熟悉度和项目相似度的削弱，这与较低的注意力分配成本一致；对于专业员工而言，这与信息搜索成本的差异一致。我们还发现，跨职能的地理分散会放大这种联系。进一步分析表明，EGD与项目延误之间的关联主要集中在项目的后期阶段，以及在高风险或高度创新的项目中。围绕夏令时转换的差异中的差异测试表明，时间错位本身并不能解释EGD与延误之间的关系。综合来看，这些结果为新产品开发、项目管理和全球工作文献提供了重要信息，展示了地理距离在何种情况下对项目延误最为重要。

title: EXPRESS: Research Opportunities in Wildfire Management from an Operations Management Perspective
abstract: Wildfires—also known as wildland fires, bushfires, and forest fires—are large-scale, uncontrolled fires that occur in vegetated areas, triggered by natural or human causes. They have significant economic, environmental, and social impacts. As with most disasters, the location, timing, and magnitude of wildfires are unpredictable. Wildfire management (WFM) has a long history in forestry research; however, it remains relatively underexplored by Operations Management (OM) researchers, partly due to the specialized knowledge required. We propose a macro-level framework to review the existing WFM literature and identify four key areas for future research: Risk Assessment, Fuel Treatment, Surveillance and Detection, and Initial Attack and Suppression. We also examine techniques for managing these functions and present cross-tabulations to map research coverage. This work enables OM researchers to identify research opportunities that align with their interests in WFM functions and their expertise in specific methodologies. We highlight research gaps and outline opportunities for empirical and analytical contributions, including predictive and prescriptive analytics. Practitioners will also benefit from discussing WFM functions to address real-world challenges.
title_cn: 表达：从运营管理的角度看野火管理的研究机会
abstract_cn: 野火——也称为野外火灾、灌木火灾和森林火灾——是在植被区域发生的大规模失控火灾，通常由自然或人为因素引发。它们对经济、环境和社会产生显著影响。与大多数灾害一样，野火的发生地点、时间和规模都是不可预测的。野火管理（WFM）在林业研究中有着悠久的历史；然而，由于所需的专业知识，运营管理（OM）研究者对此领域的探索相对较少。我们提出了一个宏观层面的框架，以回顾现有的WFM文献，并确定未来研究的四个关键领域：风险评估、燃料处理、监测与检测，以及初期攻击与扑灭。我们还考察了管理这些职能的技术，并呈现交叉表以映射研究覆盖情况。这项工作使OM研究者能够识别与他们在WFM职能方面的兴趣和在特定方法论方面的专业知识相一致的研究机会。我们强调了研究空白，并概述了实证和分析贡献的机会，包括预测性和处方性分析。实践者也将从讨论WFM职能中受益，以应对现实世界中的挑战。

title: EXPRESS: Channel Management in Outpatient Care: Implications of Telemedicine and Transportation Support
abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic accelerated telemedicine adoption, offering a convenient alternative to in-person care. However, televisits may not fully address health concerns and sometimes require supplementary in-person visits, consuming resources that could have been saved if the initial visit had been in-person. As the pandemic subsides, in-person visits are regaining popularity, prompting providers to reorient resources toward in-person care. Transportation support (or subsidies) for patients, funded by providers or the government, plays a critical role in facilitating in-person visits. In this evolving landscape of telemedicine, we study how an outpatient care provider can optimally balance virtual and in-person services and whether, and how, to engage with transportation subsidies. We connect these two questions by examining how transportation subsidies reshape the provider’s optimal capacity allocation across service channels and, in turn, affect overall patient access. We develop a stylized queueing-game model to represent the operations of a revenue-maximizing provider serving patients who strategically choose between service channels. We find that provider size, measured by total capacity relative to demand, is key. Small and large providers perform best by focusing on one channel without offering subsidies, whereas medium-sized providers benefit from carefully balancing both channels alongside subsidies. Paradoxically, transportation subsidies, which make in-person care more accessible, may reduce overall patient access to care, even when fully funded by the government. This occurs because providers may shift capacity toward a higherreimbursement channel, ultimately serving fewer patients. Differentiating payment rates between in-person and virtual visits can potentially prevent such reductions. Our study highlights the importance of capacity coordination between channels for providers and cautions policymakers that transportation support may unintentionally harm patient access. Properly designed financial incentives can help prevent such negative outcomes.
title_cn: 渠道管理在门诊护理中的应用：远程医疗和交通支持的影响
abstract_cn: 新冠疫情加速了远程医疗的普及，为面对面就医提供了便捷的替代方案。然而，远程就诊可能无法完全解决健康问题，有时还需要额外的面对面就诊，这消耗了本可以在初次就诊时节省的资源。随着疫情减退，面对面就诊重新受到欢迎，促使医疗服务提供者将资源重新调整到面对面护理上。由提供者或政府资助的患者交通支持（或补贴）在促进面对面就诊方面发挥着关键作用。在这一不断变化的远程医疗环境中，我们研究了门诊护理提供者如何在虚拟服务和面对面服务之间实现最佳平衡，以及是否以及如何参与交通补贴。我们通过考察交通补贴如何重塑提供者在服务渠道之间的最佳容量分配，从而影响整体患者的就医可及性，将这两个问题联系起来。我们开发了一个简化的排队博弈模型，以表示一个以收入最大化为目标的提供者的运营，该提供者服务于在服务渠道之间进行战略选择的患者。我们发现，提供者的规模（以相对于需求的总容量来衡量）是关键。小型和大型提供者通过专注于一个渠道而不提供补贴表现最佳，而中型提供者则通过在两个渠道之间进行仔细平衡并提供补贴而获益。矛盾的是，交通补贴虽然使面对面护理更易获得，但可能会减少整体患者的就医可及性，即使这些补贴完全由政府资助。这是因为提供者可能会将容量转向报销更高的渠道，最终服务的患者数量减少。在面对面就诊和虚拟就诊之间区分支付率可能有助于防止这种减少。我们的研究强调了提供者在渠道之间进行容量协调的重要性，并提醒政策制定者，交通支持可能会无意中损害患者的就医可及性。合理设计的财务激励可以帮助防止此类负面结果的发生。

title: EXPRESS: Navigating Traceability: How Pricing and Responsibility Sharing Impact Quality and Welfare
abstract: As consumer demand for transparency and accountability in product sourcing grows, traceability-enabled technologies are increasingly adopted across supply chains. This paper explores the diverse impacts of traceability on product quality and supply chain welfare, particularly on pricing and responsibility sharing among stakeholders. We develop a multi-agent game-theoretic model to investigate how effective traceability systems are in enhancing product quality and supply chain members’ welfare.We find that traceability operates as a double-edged sword: it does not always improve quality or benefit all parties, and its effectiveness depends critically on how pricing power and responsibility for quality failures are allocated between the buyer and suppliers. Under buyer pricing, traceability raises quality and benefits the buyer when quality improvement is cost-efficient, whereas it benefits suppliers when quality improvement is costly. Under supplier pricing, traceability always benefits suppliers, but it improves quality only when responsibility is exogenously set or when quality improvement is cost-efficient, and it benefits the buyer only when responsibility is endogenously chosen or when quality improvement is cost-efficient. These findings provide important managerial implications for practitioners and offer guidance for policymakers and firms in designing traceability systems that enhance product quality and overall supply chain welfare.
title_cn: 表达：追踪性导航：定价和责任分担如何影响质量与福利
abstract_cn: 随着消费者对产品来源透明度和问责制的需求不断增长，具备可追溯性的技术在供应链中越来越多地被采用。本文探讨了可追溯性对产品质量和供应链福利的多样化影响，特别是在定价和利益责任分担方面。我们开发了一个多智能体博弈理论模型，以研究有效的可追溯性系统在提升产品质量和供应链成员福利方面的作用。我们发现，可追溯性是一把双刃剑：它并不总是提高质量或惠及所有参与方，其有效性在很大程度上取决于买方与供应商之间定价权和质量失效责任的分配。在买方定价下，当质量提升具有成本效益时，可追溯性提高了质量并使买方受益，而当质量提升成本高昂时则使供应商受益。在供应商定价下，可追溯性始终使供应商受益，但只有在责任外生设定或质量提升具有成本效益时，质量才会得到改善，而买方只有在责任内生选择或质量提升具有成本效益时才会受益。这些发现为从业者提供了重要的管理启示，并为政策制定者和企业在设计能够提升产品质量和整体供应链福利的可追溯性系统时提供了指导。

title: Less Is Not Always More: The Impact of Social Media Block Intensity and Immediacy on Work Time
abstract: Social media use during work hours is a persistent concern for workplace productivity. Many current blocking policies are designed under the assumption that greater restriction will always produce better outcomes. However, our four-week randomized field experiment with 217 U.S. participants challenges this assumption. We compared different blocker designs along two dimensions: the degree of control (partial versus complete blocking) and the immediacy of implementation (gradual versus immediate rollout). The results show that complete blocking can backfire, reducing time spent working, whereas partial blocking increases it. In addition, gradually introducing restrictions proved more effective than imposing them immediately, particularly during periods when users historically engaged more with social media. Assuming a typical eight-hour workday, complete blocking corresponds to an estimated loss of about 20.3 productive workdays per year, whereas partial blocking is associated with a gain of roughly 6.2 productive workdays annually. Partial blocking also increased the duration of uninterrupted work sessions, indicating improved sustained focus. These findings suggest a clear implication for practice and policy; rather than adopting all-or-nothing bans, organizations, app developers, and policymakers should implement calibrated, adaptive, and phased controls that reduce distractions without triggering behavioral backlash.
topics: Personal Information Management and User Behavior
title_cn: 少即是多并不总是成立：社交媒体屏蔽强度和即时性对工作时间的影响
abstract_cn: 在工作时间使用社交媒体一直是影响工作效率的一个持续关注点。目前许多阻止政策的设计假设更严格的限制总会带来更好的结果。然而，我们对217名美国参与者进行的为期四周的随机实地实验挑战了这一假设。我们在两个维度上比较了不同的阻止设计：控制程度（部分阻止与完全阻止）和实施的紧迫性（逐步推出与立即实施）。结果显示，完全阻止可能适得其反，减少了工作时间，而部分阻止则增加了工作时间。此外，逐步引入限制比立即施加限制更有效，特别是在用户历史上更频繁使用社交媒体的时期。假设典型的工作日为八小时，完全阻止每年对应约20.3个生产性工作日的损失，而部分阻止则与每年大约6.2个生产性工作日的增加相关。部分阻止还增加了不间断工作时段的持续时间，表明专注力得到了改善。这些发现对实践和政策有明确的启示；组织、应用开发者和政策制定者应实施经过校准的、适应性的和分阶段的控制措施，以减少干扰而不引发行为反弹，而不是采取全有或全无的禁令。

title: When Vulnerability Drives Action: Designing Forward-Looking Frameworks for Disaster Preparedness
abstract: Disaster preparedness policies depend on vulnerability indices to guide disaster management. Yet, commonly used tools such as the CDC Social Vulnerability Index and FEMA’s National Risk Index rely largely on static demographic proxies, producing broad vulnerability scores that offer limited insight into the specific needs communities will face during disasters. These approaches can obscure how hazards translate into different forms of harm, such as medical needs during power outages or housing repair needs after storms, and risk embedding structural bias into preparedness decisions. This research shows that vulnerability can be reframed as directly predicting disaster-related needs. We develop the Local Impact Vulnerability Assessment (LIVA), a framework that integrates demographic, housing, socioeconomic, and health indicators with historical disaster outcomes to estimate hazard-specific community needs. Using data from federally declared disasters between 2018 and 2025, LIVA demonstrates substantially stronger alignment with observed FEMA assistance needs across hazards and need categories than existing vulnerability and risk indices. The findings suggest that disaster preparedness policy should advance beyond static indices to tailored predictive planning tools that anticipate how different hazards generate different community needs. By identifying where specific forms of assistance are likely to be required, emergency management organizations can plan, prepare, and improve the equity and effectiveness of disaster response.
title_cn: 当脆弱性驱动行动：设计面向未来的灾害准备框架
abstract_cn: 灾害准备政策依赖于脆弱性指数来指导灾害管理。然而，常用的工具如CDC社会脆弱性指数和FEMA国家风险指数在很大程度上依赖于静态的人口统计代理，产生的广泛脆弱性评分对社区在灾害期间面临的具体需求提供的洞察有限。这些方法可能掩盖了危害如何转化为不同形式的伤害，例如在停电期间的医疗需求或风暴后的住房修复需求，并可能在准备决策中嵌入结构性偏见。本研究表明，脆弱性可以重新构建为直接预测与灾害相关的需求。我们开发了地方影响脆弱性评估（LIVA）框架，该框架将人口、住房、社会经济和健康指标与历史灾害结果相结合，以估算特定危害的社区需求。利用2018年至2025年间联邦宣布的灾害数据，LIVA在不同危害和需求类别中与观察到的FEMA援助需求的对齐程度显著高于现有的脆弱性和风险指数。研究结果表明，灾害准备政策应超越静态指数，转向量身定制的预测规划工具，以预见不同危害如何产生不同的社区需求。通过识别特定形式的援助可能需要的地方，紧急管理组织可以更好地规划、准备，提高灾害响应的公平性和有效性。

title: Beyond coal: When can outsider stakeholders drive transformative change?
abstract: Abstract Research Summary Organizations grant stakeholders who provide valuable resources insider status in governance, excluding less valuable outsiders. Firms thereby assemble a value‐maximizing resource portfolio but face challenges when environmental shifts require adaptation that harms some insiders. We combine and extend new stakeholder and social movement theories, hypothesizing how various stakeholders influence such adaptation. Outsiders can enable adaptation depending on organizational governance and the array of insider stakeholders. For‐profit firms are less open to outsider influence, but a wider array of insiders enables outsiders to align with certain groups to overcome the opposition of others who resist change. The nature of these alignments shapes whether adaptation involves transformative divestments or exploratory investments. We test our theory in the context of the Beyond Coal movement to divest coal plants. Managerial Summary To gain access to valuable resources, organizations commit to stakeholders who provide these resources. However, this creates problems when adapting to changes in the environment that undermine the value of these resources. How can managers balance their stakeholder commitments with the need to integrate the concerns of other stakeholders demanding adaptive changes? We find that organizational governance and the configuration of stakeholder interests can create openings for adaptation. Studying a period of rapid environmental change in the US electric utility industry, for‐profit utilities were more likely to retire coal generators when activists aligned with consumer advocates, and more likely to invest in solar generators when activists aligned with prosumers.
title_cn: 超越煤炭：外部利益相关者何时能够推动变革性变革？
abstract_cn: 摘要 研究总结 组织在治理中赋予提供有价值资源的利益相关者内部人士地位，排除价值较低的外部人士。因此，企业组建了一个最大化价值的资源组合，但在环境变化需要适应时，可能会面临挑战，这种适应可能会损害一些内部人士的利益。我们结合并扩展了新的利益相关者和社会运动理论，假设不同的利益相关者如何影响这种适应。外部人士可以根据组织治理和内部利益相关者的构成来促进适应。盈利性企业对外部影响的开放程度较低，但更多样化的内部人士使外部人士能够与某些群体对齐，从而克服其他抵制变革的群体的反对。这些对齐的性质决定了适应是涉及转型性撤资还是探索性投资。我们在“超越煤炭”运动以撤资煤电厂的背景下测试了我们的理论。 管理总结 为了获得有价值的资源，组织承诺于提供这些资源的利益相关者。然而，当环境变化削弱这些资源的价值时，这会造成适应上的问题。管理者如何平衡他们对利益相关者的承诺与整合其他利益相关者对适应性变化的需求？我们发现，组织治理和利益相关者利益的配置可以为适应创造机会。在研究美国电力公用事业行业快速环境变化的时期时，盈利性公用事业在活动家与消费者倡导者对齐时更可能退役煤电机组，而在活动家与生产者对齐时更可能投资于太阳能发电机。

title: Algorithmic Facial Expression Analysis: A Novel Methodology to Advance Management Research on Emotions
abstract: With the rapid advancement of artificial intelligence technologies, algorithmic facial expression analysis (AFEA) has emerged as a promising methodology to measure emotions. Despite rapid adoption across management subfields, however, the full scope of AFEA’s theoretical potential remains underexplored. This paper provides a framework that links the AFEA measurement innovation to major opportunities for theoretical advancement around emotions in organizations. We start by describing the methodological basis of AFEA and reviewing its applications in management research to date. We then outline two core capabilities of AFEA—namely, capturing the temporal structure of emotions and detecting inauthentic expressions of emotions—and illustrate how these capabilities can enable theory advancement in management research. After presenting an empirical demonstration of AFEA’s capabilities and a practical step-by-step guide for using it, we conclude by discussing key considerations for realizing the future potential of AFEA research.
title_cn: 算法面部表情分析：推动情感管理研究的新方法论
abstract_cn: 随着人工智能技术的快速发展，算法面部表情分析（AFEA）作为一种有前景的方法论，开始被广泛应用于情感测量。然而，尽管在管理学各子领域的快速采用，AFEA的理论潜力仍未得到充分探索。本文提供了一个框架，将AFEA测量创新与组织中情感理论进展的主要机会联系起来。我们首先描述AFEA的方法基础，并回顾其在管理研究中的应用。接着，我们概述了AFEA的两个核心能力——捕捉情感的时间结构和检测不真实的情感表达，并说明这些能力如何推动管理研究中的理论进展。在展示AFEA能力的实证示范和使用的逐步实践指南后，我们最后讨论了实现AFEA研究未来潜力的关键考虑因素。

title: Time the Surge: Theorizing and Examining Team Pacing in Multiple-Membership Contexts
abstract: Pacing has long been critical for understanding team work patterns. As organizations increasingly embrace multiple memberships, with workers engaged in different concurrent projects, it becomes important to understand how team pacing is uniquely shaped in such contexts. Extending beyond prior theories with single-membership assumptions, we theorize a new perspective on how team pacing is influenced by multiple memberships—contexts typically characterized by non-coinciding project portfolios across members. Based on this theorizing, we examined a large-scale dataset comprising over 1.6 million entries of project activities involving 1,712 individuals across 415 team projects, and found that higher average multiple memberships among core members delayed the timing of a project’s activity surge. This surge-delaying effect was mitigated, however, when project members shared greater external project overlap. An additional experiment revealed that the reduced perceived feasibility of holistic optimization was an important psychological mechanism underlying the surge-delaying effect. Furthermore, we found that projects with longer time spans were less likely to experience a surge, but for those that did, surge timing had implications for efficiency: projects with either a markedly early surge (i.e., initial phase) or a markedly late surge (i.e., final phase) exhibited greater temporal procedural efficiency than those with an intermediate-phase surge.

title_cn: 时间的激增：在多重成员背景下理论化和考察团队节奏
abstract_cn: 节奏一直是理解团队工作模式的关键。随着组织越来越多地接受多重成员身份，员工参与不同的并行项目，理解团队节奏在这种背景下是如何独特形成的变得尤为重要。我们在超越以单一成员身份假设为基础的先前理论的基础上，提出了一个新的视角，探讨多重成员身份如何影响团队节奏——这种背景通常以成员之间项目组合的不重合为特征。基于这一理论，我们研究了一个大规模数据集，该数据集包含超过160万条项目活动记录，涉及1,712名个人和415个团队项目，发现核心成员之间更高的平均多重成员身份会延迟项目活动的高峰时机。然而，当项目成员之间共享更大的外部项目重叠时，这种延迟效应会减弱。进一步的实验揭示，整体优化的感知可行性降低是导致延迟效应的重要心理机制。此外，我们发现时间跨度较长的项目不太可能经历高峰，但对于那些经历高峰的项目来说，高峰时机对效率有影响：无论是明显早期的高峰（即初始阶段）还是明显晚期的高峰（即最终阶段），其时间程序效率均高于那些在中间阶段经历高峰的项目。
